prestazioni: Engine swap to a J32A4 (3.2L V6 from the Honda Inspire/Saber Type S) with a custom billet crankshaft from Tomei for stroked 3.5L displacement, paired with forged JE pistons (9.0:1 compression) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for 500+ hp reliability on E85 fuel

Full custom turbo system using a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HKS, integrated with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom intercooler setup featuring a PWR 4.5-core front-mount intercooler with 3-inch piping and dual 10AN oil lines for turbo lubrication

Standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom wiring harness by Wireworks, paired with a Hondata K-Pro V4 for OEM ECU integration, controlling a custom fuel system with dual Walbro 450LPH fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700X injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator for E85 compatibility
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Saber-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a custom front splitter by Varis and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser with integrated dual exhaust exits for the HKS Hi-Power exhaust system

Custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x11 +25 rear) with custom gold PCD adapters for the Saber's 5x114.3 bolt pattern, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) for aggressive stance and grip

Full custom interior by Bride with a Saber-specific Cuga II reclining bucket seat in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries (8-point chromoly) and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub for track use
